zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Griggs於1515年3月20日出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可布洛可利時，他的父親Sir William Griggs44歲，母親Katherine Browne30歲。他於1538年11月25日與Emma在英國素福爾可索莫頓結婚。他去世於1562年8月5日在他的家鄉享年47歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可布洛可利聖 安德也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Griggs
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southeastern): from the Middle English personal name Grig, a pet form of Gregory (compare Gregg ), with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Gregory
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: from a personal name that was popular throughout Christendom in the Middle Ages. The Greek original, Grēgorios, is a derivative of grēgorein ‘to be awake, to be watchful’. However, the Latin form, Gregorius, came to be associated by folk etymology with grex, gregis ‘flock, herd’, under the influence of the Christian image of the good shepherd. The Greek name was borne in the early Christian centuries by two fathers of the Orthodox Church, Saint Gregory Nazianzene (c. 325–390) and Saint Gregory of Nyssa (c. 331–395), and later by sixteen popes, starting with Gregory the Great (c. 540–604). It was also the name of 3rd- and 4th-century apostles of Armenia. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages, e.g. Italian Gregorio , German, Slovak, and Slovenian Gregor , Polish Grzegorz, Czech Řehoř (see Rehor ), and French Gregoire , and also their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Polish Grzegorczyk .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Griggs was born on 20 March 1515, in Brockley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William Griggs, was 44 and his mother, Katherine Browne, was 30. He married Emma on 25 November 1538, in Somerton, Suffolk, England. He died on 5 August 1562, in his hometown, at the age of 47, and was buried in St Andrew's Church, Brockley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Griggs est né le 20 mars 1515, à Brockley, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Griggs, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Katherine Browne, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Emma le 25 novembre 1538, à Somerton, Suffolk, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 5 août 1562, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à St Andrew's Church, Brockley, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Griggs am 20. März 1515 in Brockley, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Griggs 44 und seine Mutter Katherine Browne 30. Er hat am 25. November 1538 in Somerton, Suffolk, England Emma geheiratet. Er starb am 5. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Griggs родился 20 марта 1515 г. в местности броккли, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William Griggs было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Katherine Browne, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Emma 25 ноября 1538 г. в местности сомиртон, суффолк, Англия. Он умер 5 августа 1562 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности ст андрю'с чурч, броккли, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
